root_cause: The agent failed to successfully retrieve order details despite multiple attempts and gave up without completing either the address update or item exchange that the user requested.
explanation: The agent made multiple attempts to get order details for #W3289292 but encountered consistent failures, yet never successfully called the required tools to modify the order address or exchange the item. Instead of properly handling the tool errors or finding alternative approaches, the agent terminated early and directed the user to contact support, failing to complete the core task of updating shipping address and exchanging an item.
